parameters.query: query GetCardsByField($fieldId: String!, $fieldValue: String!, $first: Int = 50) { findCards(pipeId: 306498227, first: $first, search: { fieldId: $fieldId, fieldValue: $fieldValue }) { edges { node { id title } } } }

assignments.name: contactFields
assignments.value: ={{ ( () => { const arr = []; if ($json.email) arr.push({ field_id: 'e_mail', field_value: $json.email }); if ($json.name) arr.push({ field_id: 'nome', field_value: $json.name }); if ($json.phone) arr.push({ field_id: 'celular', field_value: $json.phone }); return arr; })() }}
